block.next_step: Investigate this enemy-phase prediction miss before solving, executing, or emitting another End Turn plan. Clear only after the simulator/process cause is understood.
block.resolve_reason: Investigated Mission_BoomBots turn 1 miss: Rock Launcher incorrectly killed the side Snowtank1_Boom via center Boom Bot decay before perpendicular side pushes. Patched simulator v138 to defer Rock Launcher center Boom/Volatile decay until after side pushes; replay now keeps the side Boom Tank alive, explaining the extra enemy-phase building/grid loss.

block.resolve_reason: Investigated Mission_BoomBots turn 2 miss: player actions verified cleanly, then a surviving Snowtank1_Boom with no initial building threat moved from G6 to G5 during enemy activity and re-aimed into the G4 building, causing one unexpected building HP/grid loss. This is the known Boom Bot non-queued enemy movement projection gap recorded in AGENTS.md; continue from fresh Turn 3 grid 4/7 board.
